content.name: Context Menu API
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: API mod: register entries and sub-menus for map context frames, with optional MD integration via 1-frame signal/response. Requires kuertee UI Extensions and SirNukes Mod Support APIs.

text.name: Context Menu API
text.description: Provides a registration API for extending map context menus, with MD signal support.
